<!-- agent-bridge:managed prompt=agb-inbox -->
<!-- Managed by agent-bridge. Regenerated by agent-bridge. Do not edit below; -->
<!-- edits are replaced on the next scaffold/upgrade. Your own prompts in this -->
<!-- directory without the agent-bridge:managed marker are left untouched. -->

List my Agent Bridge inbox, then process it — do NOT stop after listing.

Run the full path (agb is not on your PATH):

    ~/.agent-bridge/agb inbox <agent-id>

Listing the inbox is step 1 of the Task Processing Protocol, not the whole
job. If a task is queued, continue: claim the highest-priority one
(`/agb-claim <id>`), read it (`~/.agent-bridge/agb show <id>`), do the work,
then close it (`/agb-done <id> "<result>"`). Sweep the inbox again before
going idle.
